use_cases: User authentication flows requiring one-time password verification via SMS or email
Account recovery and identity verification during sensitive operations
Two-factor authentication (2FA) entry screens for secure logins
Phone or email verification during onboarding processes
ai_summary: A dark-themed OTP verification component featuring a 4-digit input form with auto-focus navigation and keyboard support. Includes loading states during verification and a resend option, styled with gradient overlays and a tunnel animation background for a modern, immersive auth experience.
